content.speakerText: I’ll have the contract emailed to you by 5 PM today — feel free to call if anything’s unclear.
content.speakerTextCn: 合同今天下午5点前发你邮箱，有疑问随时打电话。

options.text: Perfect — I’ll review it first thing tomorrow. Thanks for your patience and flexibility!
Okay, I’ll send you my changes by tomorrow.
I don’t think I’ll have time to look at it.

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了专业、积极和感恩的态度，符合商务场景的礼貌道别规范。选项2虽然主动，但未回应对方的感谢与配合，焦点错位；选项3和4语气随意或消极，不符合职场礼貌规范。

content.speakerText: Safe travels back — and again, thanks for coming all the way here.
content.speakerTextCn: 回程一路平安，再次感谢你专程赶来。

options.text: Thanks! I’ll keep you posted on the contract review — and I hope we’ll meet again soon.
Thanks, I’m tired. See you next week.
No problem. I’ll email you tomorrow.

content.explanation: 正确答案不仅表达了感谢，还主动承诺后续行动并表达未来重逢的期待，留下积极印象。选项2语气消极（'I'm tired'），破坏专业形象；选项3虽积极但未回应对方的关心；选项4过于简短，缺乏情感温度。

content.speakerText: We’ve reached a solid agreement — I’ll follow up with the paperwork by Friday.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们已达成一致，我周五前会跟进文件事宜。

options.text: That’s great! I look forward to receiving it and hope we can continue working together.
Okay, I’ll wait for your email.

content.explanation: 正确答案既肯定了成果，又表达了期待合作的积极态度，符合礼貌道别中‘建立长期关系’的核心目标。选项2语气命令式，不礼貌；选项3被动消极，缺乏情感回应；选项4虽礼貌但过于平淡，未体现主动性和未来期待。
